{{{!}} class="wikitable float-right align-center-col-1" style="font-size: 0.85em; min-width: 15em" ! Time ! [[sunOrMoon]] {{!}}- {{!}} 12:00 {{!}} 1 {{!}}- {{!}} (...) {{!}} 1 {{!}}- {{!}} 18:39 {{!}} 0.911201 {{!}}- {{!}} 18:42 {{!}} 0.576303 {{!}}- {{!}} 18:45 {{!}} 0.240862 {{!}}- {{!}} 18:48 {{!}} 0 {{!}}- {{!}} (...) {{!}} 0 {{!}}- {{!}} 06:00 {{!}} 0.695308 {{!}}- {{!}} 06:03 {{!}} 0.739519 {{!}}- {{!}} 06:09 {{!}} 1 {{!}}- {{!}} (...) {{!}} 1 {{!}}} Returns the moon to sun transition state in range 0..1.
The return value is either 0 or 1 most of the time, the in-between values only returned during a few minutes in the morning and in the evening, depending on the [[date]], and could be similar to shown here: File:sunOrMoon VR up.png|Sunrise in {{arma3}} VR File:sunOrMoon VR down.png|Sunset in {{arma3}} VR
name: sunOrMoon
